summary: Performance/polish verification pass — no redesign expected. Comprehensively tested hero 3D canvas rendering + resume after scroll, lazy-loaded Map/AIConsultant, all form submissions, SEO artifacts, accessibility skip-link, responsive overflow at 5 widths, GSAP once:true animations, and full-page console error monitoring. Nearly all checks passed.
verified_features: Zero console errors and zero page errors on load + full scroll + form submissions + AI chat
Hero <canvas> renders; still present after scrolling to bottom and back to top; mouse move works — IntersectionObserver frameloop toggle safe (no errors)
Skip-to-content link is the FIRST Tab focus target (verified: activeElement.className='skip-link', text='Skip to content') and is visible when focused (screenshot confirms)
SEO: og:image present, twitter:card=summary_large_image, canonical present, 2 JSON-LD schemas, title correct
/robots.txt returns 200 with Sitemap: line pointing to correct URL
Hero lead form submits successfully — [data-testid=lead-form-success] shown ('Request Received')
Newsletter subscribe button click succeeds (no error; success is toast-based, not a testid element)
AI launcher opens, message sent, streamed reply arrived within ~10s ('Hi! I'm the Advance Connect marketplace consultant...')
MapSection lazy-loads on scroll: iframe renders; buttons present with testids map-directions-btn, map-call-btn, map-whatsapp-btn (hrefs correct: google maps, tel:+919669503302, wa.me/919669503302)
Floating buttons: floating-whatsapp-btn href=wa.me/919669503302 with prefilled text; floating-call-btn href=tel:+919669503302; floating-book-btn (button, not anchor — expected)
GSAP once:true worked: all workflow-step-1..6 opacity=1 after scrolling past — elements did not stay hidden
No horizontal overflow at 1920, 1366, 768, 390, 344 widths (all returned 0px)
notes_not_bugs: Review-request specced testids like 'lead-form-name', 'map-directions', 'contact-form-name' — actual code uses 'lead-input-name', 'map-directions-btn', 'contact-input-name'. All elements exist and function. Recommend updating spec/docs for future tests to match code (or vice versa) to avoid confusion.
Newsletter has no 'newsletter-success' testid — success feedback is via react-hot-toast. Considered acceptable; if E2E assertion is desired, adding a hidden success testid would help future testing.

performance_observation.long_frames_during_smooth_scroll_to_top: 93 / 120 frames >50ms in headless automated browser (Lenis smooth-scroll animation)
performance_observation.note: Headless Chromium in cloud CI does not represent real user perf; long-frame count is inflated by Lenis RAF loop + 3D canvas rendering. No user-visible jank triggered errors or blocked interactions during automated flow. Recommend verifying on a real device with the browser devtools Performance panel for a definitive assessment. Optimizations from the diff (particle reduction, frameloop pause, once:true, blur reduction) are in place and structurally sound.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero3D IntersectionObserver frameloop toggle is a good pattern; ensure the observer is disconnected on unmount (verify a cleanup returns from the useEffect).
Newsletter footer: adding a data-testid='newsletter-success' (rendered briefly on success) would improve E2E testability with minimal UI impact.
Testid naming inconsistency across the codebase (lead-input-* vs lead-form-* vs contact-form-*): consider standardizing to one convention.

Skip-link visible-on-focus verified via activeElement; ensure the CSS :focus-visible outline is high-contrast on the dark hero background (currently uses fixed positioned overlay pattern which looked good in screenshot).
action_items: No functional fixes required. Optionally: standardize testid naming and/or update review-request spec to match actual code; add newsletter-success testid for automated E2E coverage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct testids: lead-input-{name,phone,email,business,challenge}, lead-select-{marketplace,sales}, lead-form-submit-button, lead-form-success; contact-input-{name,phone,email,business,message}, contact-select-{marketplace,sales}, contact-form-submit, contact-form-success; newsletter-email-input, newsletter-subscribe-btn (no success testid — toast only); map-directions-btn, map-call-btn, map-whatsapp-btn; floating-{whatsapp,call,book}-btn. Lenis smooth-scroll — wait 1.5–2s after scroll. AI reply streams 5–10s.
